about.title: About
bio: Passionate about web development, focusing on frontend and full-stack technologies. I enjoy solving real problems with code and building products.
Currently working with React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS, while continuously learning DevOps and cloud-native technologies.
about.timeline2026Desc: Building a personal tech blog to share web development practices and insights.
about.timeline2025Desc: Deep diving into React ecosystem, Next.js, and TypeScript.
